SD_TOOLTIP_SHIELD: Real-time AI safety and behavioral containment status.
OV_TOOLTIP_LEDGER: Immutable record of all agent-to-tool interactions and neural handoffs.
COMP_TOOLTIP_VERIFY: Verify cluster behavior against established safety directives.
SV_TOOLTIP_MAIN: Perform a deep system-wide security audit and verify neural integrity.
IR_TOOLTIP_ISOLATE: Sever all neural links and file system access for the selected cluster.
VAULT_TOOLTIP_PURGE: Permanently erase all encrypted credentials from the backend engine.
GOV_TOOLTIP_DIRECTIVE: System-wide rule that governs autonomous agent recruitment and tool usage.
ACONT_TOOLTIP_PERMISSIONS: Define the granular permissions for specific agent personas or mission clusters.

oversight.halt_agents_failed: Failed to halt agents. Check console.
oversight.confirm_kill_engine: 💀 KILL ENGINE: This will shutdown the backend server immediately. You will need to manually restart it. Are you sure?

oversight.kill_engine_tooltip: CRITICAL: Shuts down the backend Tadpole OS process
oversight.security_dashboard_tooltip: Deep audit of agent behavior, resource isolation, and cryptographic integrity

oversight.reject_action_tooltip: Block this action and notify the requesting agent
